headline: Meta’s glasses will turn off the camera if you tamper with the privacy light
summary: Meta is updating its smart glasses with a new privacy feature. The camera will disable automatically if the privacy LED light is tampered with. This update aims to address modders physically altering the devices.

headline: Of course viewers are giving up on Netflix shows
summary: Netflix is struggling to retain viewers for its series beyond their first seasons. "Beef" reportedly lost 70% of its viewership in its second season. Despite being the most popular paid streaming service, audience retention is a growing concern.

headline: Netflix is about to host videos from BuzzFeed, Condé Nast, and other publishers
summary: Netflix will expand its streaming library to include video content from digital media brands. Starting August 3rd, content from BuzzFeed, Condé Nast, and others will be available. The deal includes both licensed past videos and new ongoing series.

headline: Meta’s new Muse Image model can pull other Instagram users into AI photos
summary: Meta has launched Muse Image, its first AI image generation model from Superintelligence Labs. The model now powers image creation tools across Meta AI, Instagram, and WhatsApp. It allows users to integrate other Instagram users into AI-generated photos.

headline: Fast & Furious 11 Reportedly Not in Production Yet
summary: Reports indicate that Fast & Furious 11 is not yet in production. A recent on-set update from Vin Diesel was related to a FIFA World Cup promotion. Fans are awaiting official news on the next installment of the action franchise.

headline: Expand Your Home Gym With This Yoleo Weight Bench for Less Than $38 Shipped
summary: A Yoleo Weight Bench is available for less than $38, including shipping. The bench comes 95% pre-assembled, making setup quick and easy. This deal offers an affordable way to expand your home gym setup.

headline: The Coslus C20 Cordless Rechargeable Water Flosser Drops 83% to Just $6.99
summary: The Coslus C20 Cordless Rechargeable Water Flosser is currently on sale for just $6.99. This represents an 83% price drop, making it a significant deal. Good oral hygiene is recommended for everyone, including gamers.

headline: The Corsair TC100 Relaxed Is the Best Gaming Chair Priced Under $150
summary: The Corsair TC100 Relaxed is touted as the best gaming chair available for under $150. It is one of the top budget gaming chairs of 2026. This week, the chair is available with an extra 45% discount.

headline: Farage's rivals rule out standing in Clacton by-election
summary: Nigel Farage's political rivals have decided not to contest the Clacton by-election. Farage stated his intention to frame the election as "establishment versus the people." Labour has dismissed the upcoming electoral event as a "circus."

headline: Chris Mason: Farage attempts to seize back the agenda
summary: Chris Mason reports on Nigel Farage's efforts to control the political narrative. Farage aims to frame the upcoming campaign as "the people versus the establishment." This strategy is designed to reshape the public agenda and his image.

headline: Amber heat-health alerts in effect as UK set for one of longest-lasting heatwaves since 1976
summary: Amber heat-health alerts have been issued across the UK. The country is preparing for one of its longest-lasting heatwaves since 1976. Temperatures are projected to reach as high as 36C (97F) in parts of southern England.

headline: Extreme marine heatwave expected for parts of UK with risk to sea life, Met Office warns
summary: The Met Office has warned of an extreme marine heatwave affecting parts of the UK. High sea temperatures pose a significant risk to local marine life. Scientists fear wide-ranging ecological consequences from the prolonged heat.
